allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from main import logger, setup_logging; print\('Logging setup OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('mathbuddy.db'\); print\(conn.execute\(\\"SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE name='users'\\"\).fetchone\(\)[0]\); conn.close\(\)")
